active_initiative.title: Improve healthcare codebase-to-agentic-skills workflows
active_initiative.reason: The user wants the recurring loop to improve SkillForge, especially skills/codebase-to-agentic-skills, with a healthcare-domain focus.
suggested_actions: Review the codebase-to-agentic-skills workflow against recent NVIDIA-Medtech skill work.
Improve one deterministic helper, requirement, template, or evaluation behavior that makes healthcare repo-to-skills work more reliable.
Keep changes reviewable and leave a run log with sources, commands, tests, outcomes, and next action.
expected_artifacts: A reviewable patch, source-backed note, or explicit blocker.

notes: State file for recurring SkillForge strategic improvement-loop runs.
